Off Calendar Dec-15-2005 Continued To Jan-19-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Discovery Reponses And For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Dec-15-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Rebecca Bedwell-Coll, appeared for Plaintiff/moving party
Robert A. Curtis, appeared for Defendant/opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted in part and denied in part. The objections are overruled as to Nos. 7, 8, and 10. Defendant is ordered to respond further as putative class members. The motion is denied as to Nos. 17, 19, and 20. The requests do not call for application of law to fact.
The motion is granted in part and denied in part as to Special Interrogatory No. 1. The general objections are ordered stricken. As to Request for Admission Nos. 7, 8, and 10, Defendant is ordered to respond further. As to Request For Admission Nos. 17, 19, and 20, no further response is required.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order.
All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Oct-13-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Robert A. Curtis, appeared for Defendant/moving party
REbecca Bedwell-Coll, appeared for Plaintiff/opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held. Tentative Ruling adopted with modifications. Defendant's Motion For Protective Order is granted as it seeks to limit discovery to issues of standing pending determination of Defendant's Motion For Summary Judgment on the issue of standing.

MODIFICATIONS:
Modified to allow discovery of class certification issues - produce documents related to class certification and standing only. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
